name: Military
description: Advantage on tests involving combat tactics, military protocols, and handling firearms in a professional context.

name: Religious
description: Advantage on tests involving theology, religious ritual, spiritual counsel, and occult doctrine.

name: Medicine
description: Advantage on tests involving first aid, surgery, pharmaceuticals, and diagnosing conditions.

name: Covert Operative

name: Magic / Occult

name: Detective

name: Entertainment
